mapper.select: SELECT m.mat_order_code, m.order_name, m.order_date, m.emp_code, e.emp_name, get_mes_sub_code_name(m.order_status) AS order_status FROM mat_order m JOIN emp e ON (m.emp_code = e.emp_code)

SELECT m.mat_order_code, m.order_name, m.order_date, m.emp_code, e.emp_name, get_mes_sub_code_name(m.order_status) AS order_status FROM mat_order m JOIN emp e ON (m.emp_code = e.emp_code) WHERE m.order_status IN (get_mes_sub_code('요청'), get_mes_sub_code('처리중'))
AND m.order_name LIKE '%' || #{inputVal} || '%'
AND e.emp_name LIKE '%' || #{inputVal} || '%'
ORDER BY m.mat_order_code

SELECT m.mat_order_code, m.order_name, m.order_date, m.emp_code, e.emp_name, get_mes_sub_code_name(m.order_status) AS order_status FROM mat_order m JOIN emp e ON (m.emp_code = e.emp_code)
WHERE m.order_name LIKE '%' || #{inputVal} || '%'
WHERE e.emp_name LIKE '%' || #{inputVal} || '%'
AND m.order_status IN #{selectVal}
ORDER BY m.mat_order_code

SELECT o.mat_order_code, o.order_name, o.emp_code, find_emp_name(o.emp_code) AS emp_name, od.mat_code, find_mat_name(od.mat_code) AS mat_name, od.client_name, od.quantity, o.order_date, od.delivery_date, get_mat_prod_quantity(od.mat_order_detail_code) AS prod_quantity, get_mes_sub_code_name(o.order_status) AS order_status FROM mat_order_detail od JOIN mat_order o ON(od.mat_order_code = o.mat_order_code)
WHERE o.order_status IN ('PS1', 'PS2', 'PS3')
WHERE o.order_status = #{select1Val}
AND o.order_name LIKE '%' || #{selectInputVal} || '%'
AND find_emp_name(o.emp_code) LIKE '%' || #{selectInputVal} || '%'
AND find_mat_name(od.mat_code) LIKE '%' || #{selectInputVal} || '%'
AND od.client_name LIKE '%' || #{selectInputVal} || '%'
AND o.order_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{orderStartDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{orderEndDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND od.delivery_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{deliveryStartDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{deliveryEndDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY o.order_date

SELECT md.mat_order_detail_code, md.mat_order_code, md.mat_code, mat.mat_name, get_mes_sub_code_name(mat.mat_class) AS mat_class, mat.standard, mat.unit, md.client_name, md.quantity, md.delivery_date, md.ent_member_code FROM mat_order_detail md JOIN mat_common mat ON (md.mat_code = mat.mat_code) WHERE md.mat_order_code = #{matOrderCode}

SELECT m.mat_order_code, m.order_name, m.order_date, m.emp_code, e.emp_name, get_mes_sub_code_name(m.order_status) AS order_status FROM mat_order m JOIN emp e ON (m.emp_code = e.emp_code) WHERE m.mat_order_code = #{matOrderCode}
SELECT mat_code, get_mes_sub_code_name(mat_class) AS mat_class, mat_name, standard, unit, safetystock, ent_member_code FROM mat_common
SELECT mat_code, get_mes_sub_code_name(mat_class) AS mat_class, mat_name, standard, unit, safetystock, ent_member_code FROM mat_common WHERE mat_name LIKE '%' || #{matName} || '%'
SELECT client_code, client_name, client_type, tel, address, client_manager, ent_member_code FROM client
SELECT client_code, client_name, client_type, tel, address, client_manager, ent_member_code FROM client WHERE client_name LIKE '%' || #{clientName} || '%'

SELECT matod.mat_order_code, mato.order_name, mat.mat_code, get_mes_sub_code_name(mat.mat_class) AS mat_class, mat.mat_name, matod.mat_order_detail_code, matod.client_name, matod.quantity, (SELECT NVL(SUM(NVL(inspect_quantity, 0)), 0) FROM mat_inspect WHERE mat_order_detail_code = matod.mat_order_detail_code) AS "prev_quantity" FROM mat_order_detail matod JOIN mat_order mato ON (matod.mat_order_code = mato.mat_order_code) JOIN mat_common mat ON (matod.mat_code = mat.mat_code) WHERE matod.mat_order_code = #{matOrderCode}

SELECT matod.mat_order_code, mato.order_name, matod.mat_order_detail_code, matod.mat_code, mat.mat_name, matod.client_name, insp.mat_inspect_code, insp.inspect_quantity, insp.error_quantity, insp.note, find_emp_name(insp.emp_code) emp_name, insp.emp_code, insp.inspect_date, get_mes_sub_code_name(mat.mat_class) AS mat_class, matod.quantity, (SELECT NVL(SUM(NVL(inspect_quantity, 0)), 0) FROM mat_inspect WHERE mat_order_detail_code = matod.mat_order_detail_code) AS "prev_quantity" FROM mat_order_detail matod JOIN mat_order mato ON (matod.mat_order_code = mato.mat_order_code) JOIN mat_common mat ON (matod.mat_code = mat.mat_code) JOIN mat_inspect insp ON (matod.mat_order_detail_code = insp.mat_order_detail_code)

SELECT matod.mat_order_code, mato.order_name, matod.mat_order_detail_code, matod.mat_code, mat.mat_name, matod.client_name, insp.mat_inspect_code, insp.inspect_quantity, insp.error_quantity, insp.note, find_emp_name(insp.emp_code) emp_name, insp.emp_code, insp.inspect_date, get_mes_sub_code_name(mat.mat_class) AS mat_class, matod.quantity, (SELECT NVL(SUM(NVL(inspect_quantity, 0)), 0) FROM mat_inspect WHERE mat_order_detail_code = matod.mat_order_detail_code) AS "prev_quantity" FROM mat_order_detail matod JOIN mat_order mato ON (matod.mat_order_code = mato.mat_order_code) JOIN mat_common mat ON (matod.mat_code = mat.mat_code) JOIN mat_inspect insp ON (matod.mat_order_detail_code = insp.mat_order_detail_code) WHERE insp.mat_inspect_code = #{matInspectCode}
SELECT ho.mat_hold_code, ho.lot, ho.work_instruct_detail_code, ho.hold_quantity, ho.progress FROM mat_hold ho JOIN mat_store sto ON (ho.lot = sto.lot) WHERE sto.mat_inspect_code = #{matInspectCode}

SELECT matod.mat_order_code, mato.order_name, matod.mat_order_detail_code, matod.mat_code, mat.mat_name, matod.client_name, insp.mat_inspect_code, insp.inspect_quantity, insp.error_quantity, insp.note, find_emp_name(insp.emp_code) emp_name, insp.emp_code, insp.inspect_date, get_mes_sub_code_name(mat.mat_class) AS mat_class, matod.quantity, (SELECT NVL(SUM(NVL(inspect_quantity, 0)), 0) FROM mat_inspect WHERE mat_order_detail_code = matod.mat_order_detail_code) AS "prev_quantity" FROM mat_order_detail matod JOIN mat_order mato ON (matod.mat_order_code = mato.mat_order_code) JOIN mat_common mat ON (matod.mat_code = mat.mat_code) JOIN mat_inspect insp ON (matod.mat_order_detail_code = insp.mat_order_detail_code) WHERE mato.order_name LIKE '%' || #{matOrderName} || '%'

SELECT matod.mat_order_code, mato.order_name, matod.mat_order_detail_code, matod.mat_code, mat.mat_name, matod.client_name, insp.mat_inspect_code, insp.inspect_quantity, insp.error_quantity, insp.note, find_emp_name(insp.emp_code) emp_name, insp.emp_code, insp.inspect_date, get_mes_sub_code_name(mat.mat_class) AS mat_class, matod.quantity, (SELECT NVL(SUM(NVL(inspect_quantity, 0)), 0) FROM mat_inspect WHERE mat_order_detail_code = matod.mat_order_detail_code) AS "prev_quantity" FROM mat_order_detail matod JOIN mat_order mato ON (matod.mat_order_code = mato.mat_order_code) JOIN mat_common mat ON (matod.mat_code = mat.mat_code) JOIN mat_inspect insp ON (matod.mat_order_detail_code = insp.mat_order_detail_code) WHERE TRUNC(insp.inspect_date) = TO_DATE(#{dateString}, 'yyyy-MM-dd')

{ call update_mato_list(#{p_mato_list, javaType=java.util.List, jdbcType=ARRAY, jdbcTypeName=MATO_LIST, mode=IN, typeHandler=com.aio.mes.mybatis.config.MatOrderListTypeHandler}, #{p_output_msg, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=OUT}) }

{ call update_matod_list(#{p_matod_update_list, javaType=java.util.List, jdbcType=ARRAY, jdbcTypeName=MATOD_LIST, mode=IN, typeHandler=com.aio.mes.mybatis.config.MatOrderDetailListTypeHandler}, #{p_output_msg, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=OUT}) }

{ call insert_inspective_mat_order(#{p_insp_mato_list, javaType=java.util.List, jdbcType=ARRAY, jdbcTypeName=INSP_MATO_LIST, mode=IN, typeHandler=com.aio.mes.mybatis.config.InspMatoListTypeHandler}, #{p_output_msg, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=OUT})

{ call update_inspected_mat_order(#{p_insp_mato_list, javaType=java.util.List, jdbcType=ARRAY, jdbcTypeName=INSP_UPDATE_MATO_LIST, mode=IN, typeHandler=com.aio.mes.mybatis.config.InspUpdateMatoListTypeHandler}, #{p_output_msg, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=OUT})

{ call delete_inspected_mat_order(#{p_insp_mato_list, javaType=java.util.List, jdbcType=ARRAY, jdbcTypeName=INSP_UPDATE_MATO_LIST, mode=IN, typeHandler=com.aio.mes.mybatis.config.InspUpdateMatoListTypeHandler}, #{p_output_msg, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=OUT})
{ call remove_mat_order(#{p_mat_order_code, javaType=java.lang.String, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=IN}, #{p_output_msg, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=OUT}) }

SELECT mc.mat_code, find_mat_name(mc.mat_code) AS mat_name, mc.safetystock, get_current_mat_quantity(mat_code) - safetystock AS safety_stock_per_quantity, (SELECT SUM(get_used_mat_per_manu_plan(prod_code, mc.mat_code) * plan_quantity) FROM manu_plan_detail WHERE NOT process_status = get_mes_sub_code('처리완료')) AS manu_plan_per_quantity FROM mat_common mc
WHERE mc.mat_name LIKE '%' || #{matSupplyNeedInputVal} || '%'
